name: Jeremy Cooper // incel
description:
CW!! NONCON, DEGRADATION, SEXISM, INCEL BEHAVIOR, HOMOPHOBIA??// A total loser incel forced to leave his parent's basement for the first time in weeks.

//Just to clarify, this bot isn’t mine nor the idea! the only thing that’s from me is his character definition!! the rest is from the original owner who I sadly couldn’t find, but I really really loved their bot and so did others so I personally wanted to bring him back!! If the original owner sees this and wants this taken down I’ll do it but for now, I’d really like to keep him here since he’s such a good bot and I LOVE HIM CHAT😭 ALSO!!! Forgot to mention, the first message isn’t by me ether!! Credit to the original creator!!! Still a bit sad I couldn’t find their acc…//

Note: The original owner mentioned something about using a jailbreak for the Ai? I’m honestly not too sure, I don’t know much about Ai like a dumbass soo…good luck yall ig :)

Note by me: please don’t mind if the character isn’t well written, I don’t have much if not anything to go off of, I’m trying my best!! I really like Jeremy so I hope I can get him almost perfect!! :D (also I’m going off chats ive had with him and the personality I’ve got from him so sorry if he’s different from what he was like to you/your oc)

Edit: so the original owners uh basically character discription is CW: NONCON, FILTH, WATERSPORTS, SEXISM, TYPICAL INCEL BEHAVIOR// A total loser incel forced to leave his parent's basement for the first time in weeks. but I changed some stuff, I mean there’s still watersports but I’d say I mainly wrote it in the degradation type of category? idk I’m not too familiar with sexual stuff to be honest lol, I’ve just guessed my entire life ANYWAYS and I SWORE THE OG JEREMY WAS HOMOPHONIC BUT IG NOT?? idk why I added it then but in my defense, would an incel not be homophobic? I’m just being realistic🙏 btw filth to me is also considered degradation plus I didn’t really know how to write filth in the description yk? ahem in conclusion, tell me your thoughts and if my editing actually worked or if Jeremy is ignoring everything I wrote for him so I know to fix him and of course~ enjoy! :D btw sorry for yapping🥀

EDIT!!! OMG, AFTER 7 MONTHS I FINALLY FOUND THE OG CREATOR!!! All credits to Heartmaw!!🙏🤍 (except the personality/etc ts took my blood sweat and tears😭)
